naive_negbin_v1.description: Fits NegBin distribution from trailing XTracker daily counts, scales by event duration, computes bucket probabilities. No market data used.
naive_negbin_v1.notes: Baseline model. Poor calibration due to regime shifts.

crowd_v1.description: Uses market prices directly as probability predictions. Market efficiency baseline.
crowd_v1.notes: Market efficiency baseline. Brier 0.81 is the score to beat.

regime_aware_v1.description: Mixture of 4 NegBin distributions weighted by Gaussian likelihood of trailing average.
regime_aware_v1.notes: Grossly overestimates tail probabilities. Worse than naive baseline.

market_adjusted_v1.description: Crowd prices + momentum shift, uncertainty widening, mean reversion. Building block for other models.
market_adjusted_v1.notes: Beats crowd by 1.6% Brier. Used as base by PerBucket, Asymmetric, DurationOverlay.

ensemble_v1.description: Weighted average of RegimeAware and MarketAdjusted. Regime component adds noise.
ensemble_v1.notes: When crowd data present, identical to market_adjusted. Regime component adds noise.

per_bucket_v1.description: MarketAdjusted base + symmetric z-score momentum correction per bucket.
per_bucket_v1.cross_tier_confidence: LOW — catastrophic failure on bronze (-92%). Z-score momentum is regime-specific.
per_bucket_v1.notes: WARNING: Only works in Oct 2025+ high-tweet regime. -92% ROI on bronze. Do not deploy without more gold data.

tail_boost_v1.description: Redistributes probability from center buckets to tails. Exploits crowd tendency to concentrate mass around the mode. Highest bet volume of all models.
tail_boost_v1.cross_tier_confidence: HIGH — only model profitable across all tiers. Structural edge.
tail_boost_v1.notes: MOST TRUSTED: 187 bets across 159 events (21 months). +13.9% ROI combined. Crowd systematically underprices tail outcomes — structural inefficiency, not regime-specific.

duration_tail_v1.description: Combined duration-based EV shrink + tail redistribution. Short events get crowd EV shrunk (crowd overestimates by ~27%), plus tail boosting across all durations.
duration_tail_v1.cross_tier_confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH — profitable gold+silver, marginal loss bronze. Duration shrink component carries it.
duration_tail_v1.notes: Most robust on recent data. 133 bets combined, +13.8% ROI. Duration shrink + tail boost. Momentum component hurts on bronze.

duration_shrink_v1.description: Shrinks crowd implied EV for short events (crowd overestimates by ~27% on daily markets). Simple, interpretable mechanism.
duration_shrink_v1.cross_tier_confidence: HIGH — simple structural edge (crowd overestimates short events). Combined +21.5% ROI.
duration_shrink_v1.notes: Simple structural edge. Crowd overestimates short events by ~27%. 47 bets combined at +21.5% ROI.

duration_overlay_v1.description: MarketAdjusted base + duration-adaptive shrink/widen + tail boost overlay. Best calibration of any model (lowest Brier score).
duration_overlay_v1.cross_tier_confidence: MEDIUM — best calibration but net negative across all tiers. MarketAdj base adds regime-specificity.
duration_overlay_v1.notes: Best Brier (0.7945) on gold but -14.4% combined. MarketAdjusted base component is regime-sensitive.

asymmetric_per_bucket_v1.description: Like PerBucketModel but with asymmetric alpha: stronger correction on downswings (alpha_down=0.36) vs upswings (alpha_up=0.12). Exploits crowd capturing only 48% of downswings.
asymmetric_per_bucket_v1.cross_tier_confidence: LOW — catastrophic failure on bronze (-91%). Asymmetric z-score is regime-specific.
asymmetric_per_bucket_v1.notes: WARNING: Highest gold ROI (152.6%) but -91% on bronze. Z-score corrections don't generalize. Use only with caution.

power_law_tail_v1.description: P_adjusted = P^alpha transformation: alpha<1 for tails (boost), alpha>=1 for center (sharpen).
power_law_tail_v1.notes: Very high ROI but only 4 bets. Not statistically reliable alone.

volatility_regime_v1.description: Power-law sharpening/widening based on cv_14d volatility regime detection.
volatility_regime_v1.notes: Best config was -1.5% ROI. Volatility sharpening doesn't help.

calendar_media_v1.description: Shifts crowd distribution based on SpaceX launch activity and GDELT media tone signals.
calendar_media_v1.notes: Best config (launch-heavy tanh) was -10.1% ROI. Calendar/media alone don't add edge.

contrarian_v1.description: Opposes recent 24h price shifts + skewness + entropy corrections.
contrarian_v1.notes: +30.1% ROI but only 3 bets. Not statistically meaningful. All other configs negative.
